question: Use of friend functions. Add two more functions in class Distance: 1. friend istream &operator>>( istream &input, Distance &D ) 2. friend ostream &operator<<( ostream &output, const Distance &D ). In these two functions you have to Input and Output the Distance object.

test_cases.expected:
5 feet 8 inches
3 feet 6 inches
6 feet 9 inches
-3 feet -6 inches

driver: int main() { Distance d1, d2; cin >> d1 >> d2; cout << d1 << endl << d2 << endl; ++d1; cout << d1 << endl; Distance d3 = -d2; cout << d3 << endl; return 0; }
errors: Poor formatting, no user prompts, inconsistent spacing in output operator
